headline: Congress hits the pause button as Senate goes pro forma and House adjourns early!

senate.lastSessionSummary: The Senate met in pro forma session on Thursday and adjourned within 30 seconds. The chamber will reconvene Monday to consider the nomination of Matthew A. Schwartz for United States Circuit Judge for the Second Circuit, with a confirmation vote on Arthur Roberts Jones for United States District Judge scheduled for 5:30 p.m.

house.lastSessionSummary: The House met briefly on Thursday, adjourning after just three minutes with no votes recorded. The chamber introduced 39 new bills and 3 resolutions, and filed six committee reports on health research, family travel, homeland security, aviation security, and terrorism threat assessments. Monday's agenda will be announced.

committees.topic: Hearing on the Sunshine Protection Act of 2025, National Security and State Department Appropriations Act for 2027, Take Care of America's Veterans Act, and Protecting Privacy in Purchases Act

committees.committee: Committee on Veterans' Affairs, Subcommittee on Technology Modernization
committees.topic: PACT Act Implementation: Modernizing VA Disability Claims Through Effective Technology
